title: Eilistraee
bodyText:
Chaotic-good drow goddess — **daughter of Lolth** — whose whole purpose is freeing the drow from their mother's webbed underground prison: bring them topside, smell the flowers, dance in the moonlight. 9ft glossy-skinned drow, ankle-length silver hair, silver radiance. Goddess of swordwork and song. A solitary dance in her honor may turn your hair radiant silver. Art: art/eilistraee.jpg, art/eilistraee-projection.jpg

# Current truth
- Helped **Varen** escape his city (visions of a path out, moonlight, dancing). Her converts' price: **the black spot** — the mark of those who turned from Lolth (or Lolth's brand on the deserters; the docs deliberately leave it ambiguous).
- Kena had the same visions and mark, long before Varen.

> [!dm] Varen's theme song is queued in the PC guide (a YouTube link). The orb in his trances may be her — or Leliana. The two "caged lady" candidates are deliberately entangled; decide when the party gets close.
